details.special: PSI: WT: Life Detection Powers: 2 Infravision: 90’. Light sensitivity: Suffer a –2 penalty to attack rolls and a –1 penalty to AC when in bright light (daylight, continual light). Drag under: The Anakore drags the target underground and hits it with poisonous claws. The target must Save vs paralysis, if it fails it is paralyzed for 1d4 rounds, if it succeeds the target is then able to escape. 21 T

system.description:
The dune freaks, or anakore, are a race of dimwitted humanoids. They are nomadic burrowers who are constantly moving through the sandy wastes of Athas.

Psionics: WT: Life Detection Powers: 2 Infravision: 90’. Light sensitivity: Suffer a –2 penalty to attack rolls and a –1 penalty to AC when in bright light (daylight, continual light). Drag under: The Anakore drags the target underground and hits it with poisonous claws. The target must Save vs paralysis,
